validated_commands.format: python3 -m uv run black . && python3 -m uv run isort .
validated_commands.notes: uv is not on PATH in CI; use 'pip install uv --break-system-packages' then 'python3 -m uv'

coverage_baseline.notes: Pre-existing failure: test_install_command.py ANSI escape codes. primitives/models.py 78%->100%. 17 new tests added.

testing_backlog.notes: Remaining uncovered: display/formatting paths (264-333, 436-518, 759-801) - require distributed compiler stack

completed_work.description: Added 17 unit tests for primitives/models.py (78%->100%). Covered: Instruction.validate() missing description/content, Skill.validate() all branches, PrimitiveConflict.__str__(), PrimitiveCollection conflict detection (local wins, first dep wins), has_conflicts, get_conflicts_by_type, get_primitives_by_source. 1445 tests pass (1 pre-existing ANSI failure).

Added 34 unit tests for agents_compiler.py (65%->82%). Covered: CompilationConfig.from_apm_yml() additional fields, exception handling, validate_primitives errors, _write_distributed_file, summary generation methods, _merge_results, compile_agents_md error path. 964 tests pass (1 pre-existing ANSI failure).
Fixed ANSI test failure in test_install_command.py (recurring issue - strip_ansi helper). Added 22 tests for workflow/runner.py (22%->100%). All PRs closed without merge.
Added 55 unit tests for distributed_compiler.py (50%->97%). PR closed.
Added 32 unit tests for collection_parser.py (0%->100%). PR closed.
